title: EFO+
description: EFO+ is an optimisation pack/FPS Booster with tech helping mods but it's still looks good.
body:
**EFO+** is an **optimisation/fps booster** pack featuring a bit of **tech vanilla focused** mod.

With the use of **multiple mods** (as of **nvidium, sodium, ferritecore... etc**) EFO & EFO+ are an **fps booster** for your game. Minecraft will be **more stable**, you will **gain FPS** and be able to use **shaders** or even get **more render distance** easily. **Resource packs requiring optifine will also be compatible with the modpack**. With the mod **Resourcify you'll also be able to download your resource pack directly in the game.**

**EFO+** is the additional version of the EFO modpack featuring more technical mods like **Litematica, MiniHUD,  Tweakeroo** and more, making it a good way to work more easily on your redstone construction or technical side of minecraft.

**This modpack was created specifically for the Ekaii server but is free to use wherever you want.**
